name: Crostini with Portobello Mushrooms and Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh portobello mushrooms, stems removed
1/2 recipe basic crostini or fresh basil crostini
Thin shaving of Parmesan-Reggiano cheese or Asiago cheese (about 1/2 cup)
Garnish with leaves of fresh Italian parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add minced garlic and cook until garlic is softened.
3. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are soft and liquid has evaporated.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Advance preparation: Mushroom mixture can be cooled and stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days. Heat mushrooms before serving.
6. Presentation: Top crostini with mushrooms and a thin shaving of cheese. Garnish with small leaves of parsley. Serve
